exercises.stem: The ___ you work, the ___ grades you will get.
exercises.analysis: the + 比较级, the + 比较级句型表示「越……就越……」。hard 的比较级是 harder，good 的比较级是 better。

exercises.stem: This is the ___ building in the city.
exercises.analysis: 最高级前面必须加 the，所以是 the tallest。

exercises.stem: My sister is two years ___ than me.
exercises.analysis: 比较级句型 A is + 比较级 + than B。old 的比较级是 older。

exercises.stem: "This book is more better than that one." is correct.
exercises.analysis: good 的比较级是 better，不能说 more better。多音节词才用 more + 原级。

segments: This is ___1___ (最有趣) book I have ever read.
The weather is getting ___2___ (越来越冷).
exercises.analysis: interesting 是多音节词，最高级是 the most interesting。cold 是单音节词，比较级+and+比较级表示越来越冷。

exercises.question: 请用比较级和最高级完成句子并说明理由：Yangtze River is ___ (long) river in China.
exercises.referenceAnswer: Yangtze River is the longest river in China. 理由：表示「中国最长的河」，用最高级 longest，最高级前面必须加 the。
